privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for openclinica_env modify_event_definitions task by confirming that the prerequisite study (DM-TRIAL-2024) and its event definitions (Baseline Assessment, Week 4 Follow-up, End of Treatment) are synthetically generated and explicitly managed via setup_task.sh PostgreSQL queries. Verified that all target values (Baseline Name 'Screening and Baseline Visit', Description keyword 'Amendment 03', Week 4 Repeating 'true', Week 4 Category 'Treatment Window', and EOT Category 'Study Completion') exactly match the task description instructions and verifier.py logic.
